title: Xtra Silky Chinese White Yam Scallion Pancake
description: A traditional Yunnan dish featuring white yam and scallions in a silky pancake, made with a deglaze-fond and served on a wooden board.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the grated white yam, sliced scallions, flour, cornstarch, salt, and black pepper.
Gradually add in the vegetable oil and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin pancake.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Place a pancake in the pan and cook for 2 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
To make the deglaze-fond, add 1 tablespoon of mustard to the pan and stir to combine with the remaining oil and browned bits.
Serve the pancakes on a wooden board, brushed with the deglaze-fond.
